goal:
Create a single-file animated "I Love You" romantic landing page (HTML/CSS/JS, no external frameworks) with the following specs:
Layout & Typography

Centered content on a white background, full viewport height, no scroll, custom hidden system cursor.
Fonts: "Playfair Display" (serif, for main text) and "Dancing Script" (cursive, for subtitle) from Google Fonts.
Structure, top to bottom: animated heart icon → big title "I Love You" → cursive subtitle "Forever & Always" → small uppercase tagline "You are my everything" → a pill-shaped button "Send Love ♥".

Heart Icon

Built from two CSS ::before/::after pseudo-elements (rotated rounded rectangles) forming a heart shape in red (#e8002d).
Continuous heartbeat animation: scale pulses 1 → 1.15 → 1 → 1.1 → 1 with a glowing drop-shadow that intensifies during the pulse.

Title

"I Love You" in large bold red serif text, fades/slides up on load.
A shimmer effect sweeping across the text using a duplicated text layer with a moving gradient clipped to the text (background-clip: text), looping every few seconds.

Subtitle & Tagline

Subtitle in cursive script, dark, slightly faded in opacity.
Tagline in small gray uppercase letters with wide letter-spacing.
Both fade/slide in with staggered delays after the title.

Button

Red rounded "pill" button with white text, soft red glow shadow, slight scale-up and stronger glow on hover. Fades in last in the entrance sequence.

Cursor Replacement: Butterfly Trail

Hide the native cursor everywhere (cursor: none).
Render a small red dot exactly at the mouse position.
On a <canvas> overlay, draw 8–10 hand-drawn butterflies (using canvas arcs/ellipses for wings, body, and curved antennae) that follow the mouse in a trailing chain — each butterfly lags slightly behind the previous one's recent position, creating a flowing trail effect.
Each butterfly flaps its wings continuously using a sine-wave-driven scale transform, varies slightly in size/speed/color (mix of red shades), and is redrawn every animation frame.

Falling Petals

Continuously spawn floating heart/rose emoji ("♥", "❤", "🌹") at random horizontal positions at the top of the screen.
Each falls down with a slow linear animation, slight fade in/out, and a full rotation (720°) over its fall, then removes itself from the DOM after it's done.
New petals spawn at a steady interval (e.g. every ~0.6s), with a handful spawned immediately on page load.

Click & Button Interactions

Clicking anywhere on the page (except the button) bursts ~10 small red heart emoji outward from the click point in a circular pattern, fading and shrinking as they fly out, then self-removing.
Clicking the "Send Love ♥" button triggers a bigger animation: ~30 heart emoji burst out from random points across the central area of the screen in a staggered sequence (not all at once), flying outward in random directions with random sizes, fading out and removing themselves.

General Requirements

Single HTML file, inline <style> and <script>, no build tools or external JS libraries (only Google Fonts link).
Responsive sizing using clamp() for text.
Smooth, polished, "romantic greeting card" aesthetic — soft shadows, red/pink color palette, elegant serif + cursive font pairing.

Each butterfly flaps its wings continuously using a sine-wave-driven scale transform, varies slightly in size/speed/color (mix of red shades), and is redrawn every animation frame.

Falling Petals

Continuously spawn floating heart/rose emoji ("♥", "❤", "🌹") at random horizontal positions at the top of the screen.
Each falls down with a slow linear animation, slight fade in/out, and a full rotation (720°) over its fall, then removes itself from the DOM after it's done.
New petals spawn at a steady interval (e.g. every ~0.6s), with a handful spawned immediately on page load.

Click & Button Interactions

Clicking anywhere on the page (except the button) bursts ~10 small red heart emoji outward from the click point in a circular pattern, fading and shrinking as they fly out, then self-removing.
Clicking the "Send Love ♥" button triggers a bigger animation: ~30 heart emoji burst out from random points across the central area of the screen in a staggered sequence (not all at once), flying outward in random directions with random sizes, fading out and removing themselves.

General Requirements

Single HTML file, inline <style> and <script>, no build tools or external JS libraries (only Google Fonts link).
Responsive sizing using clamp() for text.
Smooth, polished, "romantic greeting card" aesthetic — soft shadows, red/pink color palette, elegant serif + cursive font pairing.

Layout & Typography

Centered content on a white background, full viewport height, no scroll, custom hidden system cursor.
Fonts: "Playfair Display" (serif, for main text) and "Dancing Script" (cursive, for subtitle) from Google Fonts.
Structure, top to bottom: animated heart icon → big title "I Love You" → cursive subtitle "Forever & Always" → small uppercase tagline "You are my everything" → a pill-shaped button "Send Love ♥".

Heart Icon

Built from two CSS ::before/::after pseudo-elements (rotated rounded rectangles) forming a heart shape in red (#e8002d).
Continuous heartbeat animation: scale pulses 1 → 1.15 → 1 → 1.1 → 1 with a glowing drop-shadow that intensifies during the pulse.

Title

"I Love You" in large bold red serif text, fades/slides up on load.
A shimmer effect sweeping across the text using a duplicated text layer with a moving gradient clipped to the text (background-clip: text), looping every few seconds.

Subtitle & Tagline

Subtitle in cursive script, dark, slightly faded in opacity.
Tagline in small gray uppercase letters with wide letter-spacing.
Both fade/slide in with staggered delays after the title.

Button

Red rounded "pill" button with white text, soft red glow shadow, slight scale-up and stronger glow on hover. Fades in last in the entrance sequence.
